locomo.label: LoCoMo
locomo.protocol: 10 official conversations, isolated per conversation, turn-level evidence IDs

longmemeval_oracle.label: LongMemEval Oracle
longmemeval_oracle.protocol: 500 official rows, isolated per question, oracle evidence haystacks

longmemeval_s.label: LongMemEval-S
longmemeval_s.protocol: 500 official rows, isolated per question, full S haystacks

longmemeval_m.label: LongMemEval-M
longmemeval_m.protocol: 500 official rows, isolated per question, full M haystacks

locomo.label: LoCoMo
locomo.protocol: 10 official conversations, isolated per conversation, turn-level evidence IDs

longmemeval_oracle.label: LongMemEval Oracle
longmemeval_oracle.protocol: 500 official rows, isolated per question, oracle evidence haystacks

longmemeval_s.label: LongMemEval-S
longmemeval_s.protocol: 500 official rows, isolated per question, full S haystacks

longmemeval_m.label: LongMemEval-M
longmemeval_m.protocol: 500 official rows, isolated per question, full M haystacks

protocol_notes: No row sampling is used in the full run.
LoCoMo is isolated per conversation to avoid cross-conversation leakage.

LoCoMo conversation indexes are built once per isolated conversation and reused for that conversation's QA rows; this preserves the official isolation boundary while avoiding repeated identical indexing work.
LongMemEval is isolated per question to match its timestamped-history protocol.
LongMemEval abstention rows are retained in counts; evidence metrics are only meaningful for rows with evidence IDs.
QA values are deterministic extractive-answer EM/F1 over retrieved context, not OpenAI GPT-4o official judge scores unless explicitly noted.
